title: How much Hyalase should I carry with me to reverse a vascular occlusion？
filename: How much Hyalase should I carry with me to reverse a vascular occlusion？.en.vtt
excerpt: So how much highlays should you have in stock now this is really referring to that emergency situation if you've blocked a blood vessel you think you've got a vascular occlusion how much high layers would i feel safe having in my tummy now this does change over time i know when i…

segments.text: so how much highlays should you have in stock now this is really referring to that emergency situation if you've blocked a blood vessel you think you've got a vascular occlusion how much high layers would i feel safe having in my tummy now this does change over time i know when i first started in aesthetics the guidelines were often set as two vials and i used to carry one before i had those guidelines and i thought i was safe with those one vials having now dealt with a number of vascular occlusions throughout training school and through people who refer them to me and even with my own vascular occlusion i've used more than two vials and so since that has occurred i like to have a minimum in my clinic but we do have a big clinic and there are eight clinicians sometimes of 20 vials that we keep in stock i think what would cover the vast majority of vascular occlusions comfortably and i'm talking because there's a spectrum with everything some vascular conclusions will two vials and they're gone and you send the patient home and happy ending but on other days you end up working much longer and

repeating the cycles much more and you can easily go to eight vials but i would say that's on the far end of the bell curve i think six would cover ninety percent of your vascular occlusions that you're likely to see in a normal working clinic now you could be very unlucky and get a particularly big vascular occlusion in which case while you're going through the process i would be using social networks to get back up and this is what often happens good clinicians have a good network and they will call on local aesthetic practitioners who have product with them to help often to attend with them as well to make sure that you've got that backup but as a short answer i would say six files makes me feel safe there's no not a lot of evidence on this we don't actually know for sure how much it takes so this is just my experience and you will hear other collisions say vastly different things and i know some think i've never used more than three vials in a procedure and others say well i've seen four or five cases where they've used 10 vials so you're gonna have to make your own decision on it my gut instinct is six is more than enough for most vascular
occlusions but you are gonna hear different things so uh until we get the evidence back um you're just going to have to take expert opinion and so i hope that helps
